Title: Relates to payment for work by a personal care aide or a home health aide with temporary protected status or other visa status
Summary: Requires insurers to pay a licensed home care services agency for work provided by a personal care aide or a home health aide with temporary protected status or other visa status; requires the licensed home services agency to have made a good faith effort to establish the employment eligibility of personal care aide or a home health aide consistent with federal regulation and statutes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to payment for work by a personal care aide or a home health aide with temporary protected status or other visa status
